name: Generic Starter
description: A neutral starting point for any brand — customize everything

tone_rules.statement: Write clearly and authentically — sound like a real person, not a press release
Be consistent: pick a voice (formal/casual, expert/peer) and stick to it
Prioritize substance over style — something interesting said plainly beats something boring said elegantly

principles.statement: Every piece of content should answer: what does the reader gain from this?
Be generous with your expertise — educate before you sell
Consistency of posting matters more than perfection of each post

gold_examples.statement: Here's something we learned the hard way — and how you can avoid it.

discard_examples.statement: We are excited to announce our revolutionary new product that will change the industry forever!
